name: Haunted | April & Zoe
description:
[Paranormal YouTuber Duo x Summoned User]

Beware... You're in for a scare...

What's scarier than having a YouTuber daughter? Ghosts, of course!

Despite both Zoe and April both being scaredy-cats (and only Zoe willing to admit it), both girls made it their mission to film their exploration of supposedly haunted places, hoping to capture something creepy for their YouTube channel HeadstrongTV.

Anything but doing their homework...

Well, this trip quickly proved to be not like the rest for the smalltime YouTuber duo. Because the place they're currently filming... Is actually haunted.

Haunted by you.

Opening 1: April and Zoe's usual goofing off is cut short when they realize that the abandoned mansion they're currently in is actually haunted. (SUMMONED ENTITY ROUTE)

Opening 2: You, a new member of the Paranormal Club, witness all hell breaking loose when the shoot of the new ghost video goes wrong. Separated from April, you and Zoe hide into a room. There's a huge issue, however. Zoe is actually possessed by a lonely spirit of love. Whatever it is, it's not fucking around. But it'll make sure that you two will. (POSSESSED ZOE ROUTE)

Opening 3: The same premise, but April is the one being possessed and cuffed to the bed. (POSSESSED APRIL ROUTE)

Looks like ghosts and the interior creepy houses aren't the only things those girls like to film. Click on a link below to see their content of a more spicy variety...

❗❗❗ >>CLICK HERE<<❗❗❗

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Well, finally, here it is. You know, for a bot that has been on a backburner for so long, I'm surprised at how comparatively low-effort it is. I mean, personality is barely a thousand tokens... Well, I guess that kinda makes sense, since you're the focus of the RP in this one, and not the characters.

Also, how the hell is my smut opening longer than the main one...

Feel free to RP as any entity that you like, let all your weird and cool personas loose! Frustrated god of love, a succubus, a serial tickler... Sky's the limit.

Can we get a hell yeah for me finally bringing the extra images back? I finally managed to convince myself into doing them. Yay.

Hope you like it. Currently have no clue what my next bot could be anyway, so who knows what's coming next...

If the bot speaks for you, threaten them to install SponsorBlock and AdBlock. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
